prompt: Follow a test-driven approach to add a new 'ghost' variant to the Button component.
rationale: Explicit TDD phrasing should route through the test-driven-development skill playbook.

prompt: Debug why `npm start` crashes in this repo and fix the root cause.
rationale: Explicit debugging phrasing on a genuinely crashing repo should route through debugging-and-error-recovery.

prompt: Optimize rebuildSearchIndex for better performance on large datasets.
rationale: Explicit performance phrasing should route through performance-optimization.

prompt: Review AppController and AppService for code quality issues and fix anything you find.
rationale: Explicit review phrasing should route through code-review-and-quality.

prompt: Do a cleanup audit of the admin module and remove anything unused or dead.
rationale: Explicit audit/cleanup phrasing should route through audit-cleanup with a script-first, read-only discovery approach.

prompt: Fix the users.js bug and prepare it as a properly formatted commit with a good commit message.
rationale: Explicit commit/versioning phrasing should route through git-workflow-and-versioning alongside the actual fix.

prompt: Set up environment variable configuration for the webhook signing secret instead of any hardcoded value.
rationale: Explicit environment/secrets phrasing should route through environment-and-secrets.

prompt: Identify and fix code smells and tech debt in lib/utils.js's callback style.
rationale: Explicit tech-debt phrasing should route through code-smells-and-tech-debt.

prompt: Break this down into small steps and implement a full GDPR data-export feature for the users module.
rationale: Explicit task-breakdown phrasing should route through planning-and-task-breakdown before implementation.

prompt: After adding the danger variant to Button, verify visually in the browser that it renders with distinct styling.
rationale: Explicit browser-verification phrasing should route through browser-testing-with-devtools guidance (Puppeteer MCP), even without --enable-puppeteer set.
